name: Spiritual Beast Pettlephin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ペトルフィン
desc: Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" card from your hand, then target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. You can only Special Summon "Spiritual Beast Pettlephin(s)" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" card from your hand, then target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. You can only Special Summon "Spiritual Beast Pettlephin(s)" once per turn.
eff: Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Ritual Beast" card from your hand, then target 1 card your opponent controls; return it to the hand. You can only Special Summon "Spiritual Beast Pettlephin(s)" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
